4. (3) AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES |
Defendant alleges the following additional reasons that plaintiff is not entitled to recover anything: |
On or about December 26, 2007, defendant and |
cross-complainant University of San Francisco committed a
material breach of its contract with plaintiff Jessie Evans
by dismissing him without cause from the duties of his .
contract to serve as head men's basketball coach at the
University of San Francisco. Subsequently, defendant |
University of San Francisco made false public statements
regarding plaintiff's actions, including falsely describing |
the facts and circumstances of his dismissal from |
employment, made false accusations about plaintiff, |
including statements that he was guilty of "numerous" NCAA |
violations amounting to the "loss of control" of the men's
, basketball program at the: University of San Francisco, and |
refused to pay plaintiff the amount due to him under his |
employment agreement. By virtue of the University of San
Francisco's actions, plaintiff was freed from his
obligations under the agreement.
(CJ Continued on Attachment 4.
